special_mechanics.name: Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Player character can climb objects such as cages. Screenshot shows Lester climbing out of a pond in Level 1.

special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Swimming sequences feature oxygen bar HUD element. Player must manage oxygen while submerged.

special_mechanics.name: Kicking
special_mechanics.description: Unarmed protagonist can kick at small creatures early in game before acquiring weapon.

special_mechanics.name: Laser Pistol Combat
special_mechanics.description: Three-mode weapon: standard fire, force field projection to block enemy fire, and charged shot for breaking through barriers and walls.

tier_notes: Tier 2 qualitative data only. Available source (Wikipedia) provides gameplay mechanics and design philosophy but contains no quantitative physics parameters (speeds, accelerations, gravity values, sub-pixel precision). Movement data would require ROM analysis, engine documentation, or empirical measurement.
